$comment: Validated by src/lib/validateConfig.js, a zero-dependency checker that interprets a subset of JSON Schema (type, required, properties, additionalProperties:false, enum). If you add keywords outside that subset, extend checkNode in validateConfig.js to honor them.
title: autobuild.config
description: Per-repo policy for the autobuild workflow. Lives at .claude/autobuild.config.json in each consuming repo.

base.description: Base branch worktrees branch off and the supervisor merges into (e.g. development).

pushAllowed.description: If false, no agent or supervisor may git push. Local merges only (no CI/CD trigger).

ticket.description: Ticket-system adapter. Command templates with {placeholder} substitution.

system.description: Adapter id, e.g. bd | jira | linear.

syncPull.description: Pull ticket state (optional, e.g. bd dolt pull).

syncPush.description: Push ticket state (optional, e.g. bd dolt push).

mode.description: How the merge barrier integrates reviewed work. Only local-merge implemented initially.

toolchain.description: Shell commands. Any may be empty string to skip.

ready.description: Tag marking a ticket ready for autonomous build.

parked.description: Tag the supervisor applies when parking a ticket for human attention.

ui.description: Rendered UI-review settings. Omit if the repo has no renderable frontend.

devServerPortBase.description: First port for per-worktree dev servers; wave index is added.

appGlob.description: Glob whose diff hits trigger the UI reviewer, e.g. apps/web/**.

devServerCmd.description: Command to start the dev server. Placeholders: {port}.

brandGuidePath.description: Path to a brand/style guide doc the UI reviewer and implementers consult.

concurrency.description: Max tickets built in parallel per wave.

maxTicketsPerRun.description: Hard cap on tickets per autonomous run.
